text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My fav Umamusume is live streaming<n>today! ♪
I've gotta check out her new<n>merch and peep her
socials too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And! Tomorrow's her concert! But I have<n>
homework and training to do...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There's just way too much goodcontent... How am I... supposed to keepup...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...with all this HAPPINESS?! Ahhh, this is<n>perfect!
I'm living my best life!
